sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_vectors (id UInt64, vector Tuple(Float64, Float64), p_value Float64);
SELECT id, LpNormalize(vector, p_value) AS normalized_vector FROM test_vectors WHERE p_value BETWEEN 1 AND 10;
SELECT id, LpNormalize((x -> x + 1)(vector.1, vector.2), p_value) AS normalized_vector FROM test_vectors;
SELECT id, LpNormalize(tup, p_value) AS normalized_vector FROM (SELECT vector AS tup, p_value FROM test_vectors) AS sub;
SELECT id, LpNormalize((3, 4), (x -> x * 2)(p_value)) FROM test_vectors WHERE p_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, SUM(LpNormalize(vector, p_value).1) AS sum_first_dim FROM test_vectors GROUP BY id HAVING SUM(p_value) < 10;
SELECT vector, LpNormalize((x -> (x.1^2 + x.2^2)), 2) FROM (SELECT vector FROM test_vectors WHERE vector.1 IS NOT NULL) AS sub;
INSERT INTO test_vectors SELECT id, (NULL, 4) AS vector, 3 FROM test_vectors WHERE vector.1 IS NULL;
WITH (SELECT LpNormalize((0, 0), 1)) AS norm_value SELECT id FROM test_vectors HAVING LpNormalize((1, 1), norm_value.1).1 <= 1;
